top_signals.title: US Bond Futures Surge to Drive Wagers on a July Fed Rate Hike
top_signals.summary: The Treasury market saw a record surge in futures trading that underpins bets that the Federal Reserve’s next move will be to boost interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Wall Street recovers from Fed slump, and the next step for Amazon's AI chip ambitions
top_signals.summary: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Hyperliquid poised to become more than an exchange and drive HYPE higher, Hyperion CEO says
top_signals.summary: Hyperion CEO argued investors are still underestimating the decentralized exchange's transformation into a broader blockchain ecosystem.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
